chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P.No.D-112 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 04.06.2025 Mr. Javed Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. ------ Learned counsel for the petitioner under the cover of his statement dated 04.06.2025 has filed copy of order dated 06.03.2025, passed by the Deputy Inspector General of Prisons, Sukkur Region, Sukkur, whereby the petitioner has been reinstated and posted at District Prison and Correctional Facility, Ghotki. Mr. Javed submits that since grievance of the petitioner has been redressed/resolved, therefore, he under the instructions does not press this petition; however, the petitioner will avail the remedy for release of arrears/outstanding salary period w.e.f. 02.03.2022 before the competent forum. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge Manzoor
